summary: Comprehensive testing of FinSites bug fixes completed successfully. All specified improvements verified: business name extraction (detects 'Deft Services' not 'home'), SEBI SCORES link detection passes for deftservices.in, multi-select business types with re-check functionality working, Logo & Branding section added to wizard Step 2, admin functionality 100% operational.
passed_tests: Backend audit engine improvements - business name extraction detects 'Deft Services - सपने आपके, जिम्यादारी हमारी' (not 'home')
SEBI SCORES link detection passes for deftservices.in
Services detection from scanned sites working (Mutual Funds, Insurance, PMS, Tax Planning, etc.)
Multi-select business type toggle chips in audit results page
Re-check compliance button functionality - updates business types and re-runs compliance checks
Logo & Branding section in wizard Step 2 with has_logo toggle, logo URL field, and brand color pickers
Admin login with admin@finsites.in / admin123 working
Admin dashboard loads with correct stats (2 submissions, 11 audits, 3 enterprise leads)
Plans API returns 3 plans (starter, professional, enterprise)
Full wizard flow from plan selection to Step 2 registration details
Audit business type update API (PUT /api/audit/{id}/business-type) working
All backend APIs 100% functional (25/25 tests passed)

success_percentage.backend: 100% (25/25 tests passed including new audit improvements)
success_percentage.integration: 100% (audit scan, multi-select, re-check, wizard flow all working)
